rumors.template: {subject} bribed someone on the scholarship committee.
{subject} avoids every dorm event that serves alcohol, without ever saying why.
{subject}'s cloud storage synced to the wrong device and now everyone's seen it.
{subject} spread a rumor about {other} cheating just to get back with them.
{subject} is quietly job-hunting behind their team's back before finals even end.
{subject} still hasn't returned the hoodie they borrowed in September.
{subject} has a standing weekly appointment they refuse to talk about.
{subject} is secretly supporting a baby they had at 16, and it's why they're always broke.
{subject} takes the last of the shared snacks and never restocks them.
{subject} used student government funds to pay for a personal trip.
{subject} only started dating {other} to get closer to their roommate.
{subject} made a group chat specifically to talk about {other} behind their back.
{subject} used a connection to skip the waitlist for a competitive class.
{subject} is being pressured by their family to give up the baby for adoption.
{subject} still has access to their ex's social media and never logged out.
{subject} RSVP'd yes just so they could bail last minute, again.
{subject} missed two weeks of classes for what they're calling 'a family thing,' but they were seen coming out of a women's clinic.
{subject} recently found their biological parents through a DNA test, and it's not who they expected.
{subject}'s scholarship got pulled after someone reported their grades were faked.
{subject} takes credit for planning events they showed up ten minutes late to.
{subject} broke up with {other} over text and blocked them everywhere.
{subject}'s side hustle is writing essays for high schoolers for cash.
{subject} keeps bringing up a mistake {other} made months ago.
{subject}'s old posts from freshman year are extremely not okay.
{subject}'s 'stomach flu' has lasted three weeks and shows no signs of stopping.
{subject} and {other} both think they might be the father of the same pregnancy.
{subject}'s 'allergy medicine' is definitely not allergy medicine.
{subject} has been liking every single one of their ex's old photos at 2am.
{subject} has been overcharging people for rides to the airport.
{subject} has been quietly building a case against their own club president.
{subject} is threatening to go public with an old scandal if they don't get the promotion.
{subject} switched seats in class just to avoid saying hi to {other}.
{subject} posts vague callouts online that are obviously about {other}.
{subject} had an abortion over winter break and hasn't told the father.
{subject} pretends not to remember people's names on purpose.
{subject} borrowed money from half the dorm and has no plan to pay anyone back.
{subject} is in love with {other}, but {other} has no idea.
{subject} has been buying prescription stimulants off other students during finals.
{subject} is planning to keep the pregnancy a secret until after finals.
{subject} promised {other} a leadership spot just to get their vote.
{subject} is running a fake tutoring service that just gives out the answer key.
{subject} has never actually met the person they call their 'partner' in person.
{subject} got someone else to take their entrance exam for them.
{subject}'s DMs got leaked and it's worse than anyone expected.
{subject} and {other} are pretending to hate each other, but they've been together for months.
{subject}'s 'study group' is actually a subscription service they charge people for.
{subject} has been unusually secretive about a doctor they keep seeing off campus.
{subject} has been telling people they're 'basically dating' someone who's never heard of them.
{subject} has three unpaid parking tickets under someone else's name.
{subject} is the product of an affair their mom had, and their legal father doesn't know.
{subject} is selling their prescription meds to cover rent.
{subject} secretly failed the class everyone thinks they aced.
{subject} only apologized because everyone was watching.
{subject} has been sneaking into {other}'s dorm after curfew for weeks.
{subject} has a drinking habit that's gotten a lot worse since midterms.
{subject} only recycles bottles when someone's watching.
{subject}'s family cut them off financially the same week they announced their major change.
{subject} screenshots everything and has a whole archive on everyone.
{subject} was asked to leave a party for being visibly out of it.
{subject} has a secret ranking of the dorm's best-dressed people, and it's brutal.
{subject} faked a whole relationship for a class project and it got out of hand.
{subject} has been quietly skimming money from the dorm fundraiser.
{subject} has been taking credit for a joke that isn't theirs.
{subject} is still texting their ex while dating {other}.
{subject} has been using a tracking app to see where {other} goes at night.
{subject} accepted money to change a grade on someone's behalf.
{subject} has been reselling stolen textbooks from the campus bookstore.
{subject} has been talking about starting a podcast for two years and never has.
{subject} and {other} are pretending they don't know each other, but they're actually half-siblings from the same absent father.
{subject} keeps 'forgetting' to pay their share of the group gift.
{subject} is secretly interviewing at a company that competes with their mentor's.
{subject} and {other}'s 'friendship' is definitely something more.
{subject} promised to keep a secret in exchange for a spot on the committee.
{subject} pretends to hate reality TV but has seen every episode twice.
{subject} has been low-key competing with their own best friend for attention.
{subject} has a finsta where they talk about everyone in the dorm.
{subject} threw a group project under the bus in the interview to make themselves look better.
{subject} runs a gossip account that everyone reads but nobody admits to following.
{subject} and {other} hooked up once and have been awkwardly avoiding each other since.
{subject} copies everything {other} wears within a week.
{subject} is planning an abortion they haven't told anyone about, not even {other}.
{subject} has a drawer full of pill bottles with someone else's name on them.
{subject} has been quietly feuding with their roommate over dishes for a month.
{subject} has been telling people they're an only child, but they actually have a sibling in foster care.
{subject} has missed three morning classes in a row and won't say why.
{subject} has been catfishing people online under a fake name.
{subject} has a shaky hand they're trying very hard to hide.
{subject} pretended to lose {other}'s number so they wouldn't have to hang out.
{subject} has been avoiding {other} ever since the group project.
{subject} told {other} they loved them, but they were saying it to someone else the same week.
{subject}'s parents found out about the abortion and haven't spoken to them since.
{subject} only likes people's posts when they're trying to make someone jealous.
{subject}'s roommate found empty bottles hidden all over their side of the room.
{subject} got left out of the group chat on purpose.
{subject} has documents that could get someone removed from student government.
{subject} only got invited to the party so people could keep an eye on them.
{subject} told {other} they were pregnant just to see how they'd react, and it wasn't true.
{subject} has an anonymous account dedicated entirely to subtweeting the dorm.
{subject} left {other} on read for four days and then acted normal.
{subject} has a whole spreadsheet ranking people in the dorm.
{subject} made a fake dating profile just to see who {other} would talk to.
{subject} has a whole secret second boyfriend/girlfriend off campus.
{subject} swore off drinking after last semester, but nobody believes it'll stick.
{subject} only talks to people when they need something.
{subject} got a professor to write a recommendation letter they didn't earn.
{subject}'s grades tanked the same month their prescription got 'lost.'
{subject} told everyone they were 'too busy' to help, then showed up to the party.
{subject} has a second, secret bank account nobody knows about.
{subject} is secretly seeing their professor outside of class.
{subject} keeps disappearing for hours and coming back looking rough.
{subject} was seen buying way more cold medicine than any cold requires.
{subject} got locked out of their own account after someone guessed their password.
{subject} and {other} are technically still married from a drunken Vegas trip.
{subject} took a job offer meant for someone else after a mix-up nobody corrected.
{subject}'s mom showed up on campus crying, and nobody knows why yet.
{subject}'s ex moved into the same dorm just to be closer to them again.
{subject} had a miscarriage last month and told everyone it was 'just stress.'
{subject} got caught reusing an old essay and blamed a computer glitch.
{subject} forged a professor's signature to get out of a failing grade.
{subject} disappeared for a whole weekend and came back not talking about it.
{subject}'s parents are getting a divorce, and it's because their dad has a whole second family in another state.
{subject}'s 'private' story isn't as private as they think.
{subject} proposed to {other} in private, and {other} said no.
{subject} checked into a program over the summer and told everyone it was 'travel.'
{subject} broke up a long relationship between {other} and someone else, on purpose.
{subject} only joined the club to get closer to who's running it.
{subject} keeps a list ranking everyone they've dated on campus.
{subject} has been sending money home every month and won't say why.
{subject} has been reading {other}'s texts over their shoulder for weeks.
{subject} is playing both sides of the student council election.
{subject} let {other} take the fall for a decision that was actually theirs.
{subject}'s parents pulled them out for a month and wouldn't explain why.
{subject} has been taking credit for {other}'s research in front of professors.
{subject} has been leading on three different people at once.
{subject} got the internship because their family knows the hiring manager.
{subject} keeps borrowing money right after payday, every single time.
{subject} promised the club presidency to three different people.
{subject} only pretends to be single because they're actually already engaged back home.
{subject} is quietly asking around about adoption agencies.
{subject} used student council funds to cover a personal debt.
{subject} has been using a friend's login to spy on a group chat they got removed from.
{subject} has been selling access to a leaked final exam.
{subject}'s search history got left open on a shared computer.
{subject} is holding a secret meeting to plan a leadership takeover.
{subject} paid someone to write their entire senior thesis.
{subject} has been 'borrowing' the communal charger permanently.
{subject} is running a secret campaign to unseat the current dorm president.
{subject} has a whole ranking of who's allowed to sit where at dinner.
{subject} took credit for a group project nobody else got to finish.
{subject} used a fake sob story to get out of paying rent to their roommate.
{subject}'s sibling secretly transferred here just to keep an eye on them.
{subject} is the reason their older sibling got disowned from the family will.
{subject} paid for their own abortion in cash so it wouldn't show up on their parents' insurance.
{subject} has screenshots of a conversation {other} thought was deleted.
{subject} leaked {other}'s business idea to a rival group.
{subject} inherited a large sum from a grandparent nobody knew they were close to.
{subject} claims they 'don't care about drama' and somehow knows all of it.
{subject} and {other} broke up, but nobody's told their friend group yet.
{subject} is dating {other}'s ex behind their back.
{subject}'s 'internship' is actually a pyramid scheme they're recruiting people into.
{subject} sold their notes to a rival dorm right before the final.
{subject} sold fake concert tickets to half the dorm.
{subject} found out mid-semester that they were adopted, and their parents never planned to tell them.
{subject} cheated on {other} during winter break and never confessed.
{subject} used insider information from a professor to get ahead on an assignment.
